made_changes: Added support/onboarding/release_export.sh as the clean public release export verb; it excludes project/ and brick_protocol.egg-info/, creates a fresh output git repo with one initial commit, and prints remote/tag/push follow-up commands without pushing.

Added release_export_exclusion to the support checker kernel, check_profile dispatch, path admission, and read_side_projection_boundary profile, including a mutation RED probe for removing project/ from the exclusion list.

Updated README.md, support/docs/references/quickstart.md, and support/dashboard/DEPLOY.md with AI-runnable onboarding, status inbox watch loop, release export, Vercel static, and Docker realtime instructions with expected output and failure signals.

Updated support/operator/ledger_projection.py and support/checkers/check_project_declaration.py so absent project/ or status-only project scaffolds are treated as empty support projection state, while real undeclared vessels with buildings/declarations still reject.

External mutation RED observed after removing project/ from release_export.sh: release_export_exclusion rejected the export verb.

Release export proof path: /private/tmp/brick-release-export.NLKSwM; copied 282 files, excluded 3801 project/ entries, excluded roots were project/ and brick_protocol.egg-info/, initial commit 7dd2a54, no project/ before bake or before check_profile.
Clean export bake proof: bake_dashboard_data_json() wrote support/dashboard/public/dashboard-data.json with source_truth False and buildings 0.
Clean export gate: env -u BRICK_REPORT_GRAIN ... check_profile.py --all exited 0 in /private/tmp/brick-release-export.NLKSwM.
Final temp source copy gate: /private/tmp/brick-release-source-final.K9ExQx/repo baked dashboard-data.json with source_truth False and 29 buildings, then check_profile.py --all exited 0.
git diff --check exited 0; live checkout has only README.md and support/* edits plus new support/onboarding/release_export.sh.
No Claude/Gemini model review evidence was run or used; checker output is support evidence only.
